input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.3.1
            TITLE: composite anti intrusion plates:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.3.1: Composite Anti Intrusion Plates:
F.8.3.1 Composite Anti Intrusion Plates: 
a. Must not fail in a frontal impact  
b. Must withstand a minimum static load of 120 kN distributed over the 200 mm x 100 mm 
minimum Impact Attenuator area

final_answer: F.8.3.1 Composite Anti Intrusion Plates: F.8.3.1 Composite Anti Intrusion Plates: a. Must not fail in a frontal impact b. Must withstand a minimum static load of 120 kN distributed over the 200 mm x 100 mm minimum Impact Attenuator area
